mentions.note: CEO Bill Brown (ex-L3 Harris) making company nimble and competitive; quietly surprising people; report Tuesday.

Turnaround story accelerating under CEO Bill Brown (ex-L3 Harris); organic growth turned positive (+2.1% in 2025), operating margins recovering to 23%, EPS +18% YTD; 12 straight quarterly beats; new product launches up 68% (284 products in 2025); stock down 8% from Dec high on overreaction to mixed quarter; valued at just under 19x forward P/E—cheap; Cramer rarely pounds table like this; time to buy into a great contrarian entry point for the first time.

Magnificent Q2: organic growth 5.4% (best 5+ years), EPS +11%, cash conversion 107%, guidance raised. Innovation restarted (350+ new products, vitality index climbing). Data center Microsoft deal (expanded beam optics, 100 patents). Industrial safety growth. PFAS resolved. CEO execution excellent.
